LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE OBJECTION TO REFEREE'S STATEMENT OF DECISION THE COURT OVERRULES THE OBJECTIONS, AND ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTS THE REFEREE'S STATEMENT OF DECISION. THE COURT AGREES THAT MR. HAND'S IMPOSITION OF A DEADLINE TO COMPLETE THE PUNCHLIST BY 11/18/17 AND LEAVE THE PREMISES BY 11/21/16 DID NOT ALLOW A&W SUFFICIENT TIME TO REMEDY ANY PURPORTED DEFECTS, PARTICULARLY BECAUSE HE FAILED TO NOTIFY A&W OF MANY OF THE PURPORTED DEFECTS IN HIS ARCHITECT'S PUNCHLIST. A&W DID NOT BREACH THE CONTRACT OR ANY DUTY TO MR. HAND AND/OR WAS EXCUSED FROM PERFORMANCE. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A FORM OF JUDGMENT APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2020 Off Calendar

Hearing Re Objection To Referee'S Statement Of Decision
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Estavillo, Esq. 510-982-3001 for Plaintiff.
Justin Fields, Esq. 415-957-3079 of Duane Morris for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court annnounces it has read the Referee's statement of decision and agrees with it. Defendant argues there is a discrepancy in the ruling. Plaintiff argues issues have been raised previously. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Hearing Re Objection To Referee'S Statement Of Decision

The Court overrules the objections, and adopts the tentative ruling. The court adopts the referee's statement of decision. The court agrees that Mr. Hand's imposition of a deadline to complete the punchlist by 11/18/17 and leave the premises by 11/21/16 did not allow A&W sufficient time to remedy any purported defects, particularly because he failed to notify A&W of many of the purported defects in his architect's punchlist. A&W did not breach the contract or any duty to Mr. Hand and/or was excused from performance.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Plaintiff to prepare a form of Judgment approved as to form.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
